_meta._comment: Brain OS Cron Job Templates — Prompt Externalization Architecture
_meta._architecture: Since v2, all prompt content lives in independent .md files under prompts/cron/. Jobs here only contain a file-path reference (引导语). The agent reads the .md file at runtime.
_meta._migration_note: Migrated from v1 (inline prompts + webhook delivery) → v2 (external md files + announce delivery) on 2026-04-08

_placeholders.{{DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL}}: Discord webhook URL (legacy, now using announce mode)
_placeholders.{{MAIN_MODEL}}: Model ID for main agent tasks

jobs.name: personal-ops-morning-brief
jobs.description: 每天 07:00 生成 Personal Ops 今日驾驶舱

payload.message:
【定时任务】请先读取任务文档获取完整指令：

📄 文件路径：{{BRAIN_ROOT}}/04-SYSTEM/prompts/cron/personal-ops-morning-brief.md

读取后严格按照文档内容执行。如果文件不存在，报告错误并终止。
